title: HDFC Bank Q1 business update: Gross advances rise 15% to Rs 30.61 lakh crore
summary: HDFC Bank has announced robust financial results for the April-June quarter of FY27. Gross advances surged 15.4% year-on-year to Rs 30.61 lakh crore.  Advances under management also saw a healthy 12.4% increase.  Deposits grew by 14.7% to Rs 31.71 lakh crore, with CASA deposits rising 9.4%, indicating strong customer confidence and business expansion.

title: Buy or sell: Sumeet Bagadia recommends three stocks to buy on Monday - 6 July 2026
summary: Regarding stocks to buy on Monday, 29 June, Sumeet Bagadia recommended these three buy-or-sell stocks: Max Healthcare, Ultratech Cement, Indian Hotels

title: Only one old-school haven stands firm during Iran war as gold, others lose luster
summary: In times of trouble, investors usually flock to so-called traditional haven investments but the Iran war has put a question mark next to several of these former flights to safety.

title: TVS Motor accelerates in Q1, but valuation leaves little room for error
summary: TVS Motor posted record Q1FY27 sales on strong exports and EV growth, extending its FY26 market-share gains. But with shares at 32x FY28 earnings, execution has to stay near-flawless to justify the price.

title: Gold prices have fallen. Here's what could trigger the next rally
summary: Trade policy, inflation, geopolitics, recession fears and central bank buying will determine whether gold resumes its bull run or extends its correction.

title: Why is Bank of Baroda paying $600 million to settle a case?
summary: While the bank has asserted that the settlement was reached without any admission of liability, it has revived allegations by NMC founder B.R. Shetty, who has long accused senior Bank of Baroda officials of colluding with former NMC executives in a fraud that caused the healthcare group’s collapse.

title: How to improve your credit score from 600 to 750 with smart financial habits and better credit management
summary: A stronger credit score starts with smart habits. You can improve your credit score from 600 to 750 by repaying your debt obligations on time, keeping credit utilisation low, avoiding unnecessary applications and checking your credit report regularly for steady financial progress.

title: ITR 2026: Withdrawing EPF before completing 5 years becomes taxable —  Here's how to report it in your tax return
summary: EPF withdrawals are tax-exempt after five years of service. Early withdrawals are taxable unless in specific situations. Here's how they are taxed and how to report such withdrawals in ITR.

title: EPFO discontinues UAN activation on portal: What PF subscribers should know
summary: EPFO has restored its Unified Member Portal after a major upgrade. However, UAN activation and new UAN generation have moved to the UMANG app. Here's everything PF subscribers need to know.

title: 5 red flags investors should watch out for before choosing a financial product
summary: If an investment product promises exceptionally high returns and claims little or no risk to the amount invested, you should consider it as a clear red flag.

title: Sebi open market share buy-back norms explained: Eligibility, timeline and impact
summary: Sebi has approved the reintroduction of share buy-backs through the open market route from 1 August 2026. The buy-back timelines have been reduced, and promoters are not allowed to participate.

title: Is it a bank holiday today? Check RBI calendar to know if SBI, HDFC, ICICI, others are open or closed on 4 July
summary: Check RBI calendar to know if SBI, HDFC, ICICI, others are open or closed on 4 July. RBI's holiday schedule provides comprehensive detail about non-working days for banks under Negotiable Instruments Act and other under Banks’ Closing of Accounts in addition to weekend offs.

title: Top picks! Redington, among 5 stocks with upside potential of up to 27%. Do you own any?
summary: Monarch Networth Capital has maintained Buy ratings on Pricol, Redington, Sundram Fasteners, Travel Food Services and Viyash Scientific, citing strong earnings growth, improving margins and business expansion. The brokerage sees upside potential of up to 27% across these stocks.

title: Why the capital cycle approach is a powerful framework for long-term investing
summary: Edward Chancellor advocates the capital cycle approach, urging investors to focus on industry supply, capital allocation and management quality instead of demand forecasts. He argues disciplined capacity, rational competition and long-term thinking can uncover overlooked opportunities and deliver superior investment returns.

title: US rally vs India story? Wealth managers explain why NRIs should stay the course for next 10 years
summary: Despite recent volatility, wealth managers believe NRIs should remain invested in India, citing strong structural growth, resilient domestic capital markets, improving corporate fundamentals and long-term earnings potential. They argue temporary market and currency fluctuations should not overshadow India's long-term wealth creation opportunity.

title: Vedanta among top 5 stocks with lowest price-to-earnings ratio. Check details
summary: Repco Home Finance, LIC Housing Finance, Power Finance Corporation, Vedanta and The Great Eastern Shipping feature among the cheapest stocks by price-to-earnings ratio. Most are widely held by mutual funds and carry strong Value Research ratings.

title: Yes Bank Q1 business update: Advances rise 18% to Rs 2.85 lakh crore, deposits up 14%
summary: Yes Bank reported an 18.4% year-on-year rise in loans to ₹2.85 lakh crore and a 14% increase in deposits to ₹3.15 lakh crore for Q1 FY27. The bank's liquidity coverage ratio improved, while deposits declined marginally on a sequential basis.

title: Concurrent Gainers: 13 stocks gained for 5 days in a row
summary: Despite the Sensex rising just 0.86% over five trading sessions, 13 BSE 500 stocks posted gains every day. Cemindia Projects led with a 19% jump, followed by Choice International, Oberoi Realty and Eternal, highlighting strong stock-specific momentum.

title: Reliance market value now equals India's top five IT companies combined
summary: A sharp selloff in Indian IT stocks has reduced the combined market capitalisation of the top five IT firms to nearly match Reliance Industries at around ₹18 lakh crore. AI disruption fears, weak technology spending and macro uncertainty continue to pressure the sector.

title: Inspira seals Rs 1,800-crore private credit for Burger King buy in India
summary: Inspira Global, backed by Ajanta Pharma promoters, is securing ₹1,800 crore in private credit to acquire a controlling stake in India's Burger King operator.  The food business, through its arm Lenexis Foodworks, has already raised ₹1,050 crore via NCDs, with the remaining ₹800 crore anticipated this month. This significant funding signals a major move into the quick-service restaurant sector.

title: Adani Enterprises QIP gets nearly 4x bids, successfully raises Rs 15,000 crore
summary: Adani Enterprises successfully raised ₹15,000 crore through a qualified institutional placement, attracting significant interest from both foreign investors like Capital Group and Goldman Sachs, and domestic mutual funds. The issue was oversubscribed nearly four times, with the funds earmarked for capital expenditure, debt repayment, and strategic growth initiatives. This successful fundraising underscores strong investor confidence in the company's expansion plans.

title: Sebi tweaks rules on handling of unpaid securities
summary: The Securities and Exchange Board of India has simplified rules for stockbrokers handling unpaid client securities.  A new automated pledge system will now manage these shares, directly crediting them to client demat accounts while pledging them to a special broker account. This move aims to ease operational hurdles and align with current market practices, addressing concerns raised by the broking industry.

title: FMCG, healthcare in line for strong show in FY27: Brickworks
summary: India's consumer goods and healthcare sectors are poised for robust growth this fiscal year, driven by tax relief, increasing consumer spending, and a booming medical tourism industry.  Brickwork Ratings anticipates a significant revenue jump for consumer goods, while healthcare benefits from strong financial health and government initiatives.  Most sectors show a stable outlook, with power distribution being the sole exception due to persistent debt issues.

title: Dalal Street also smokes peace pipe, ends in green for 4th week in row
summary: Indian stock markets concluded their fourth consecutive week of gains, buoyed by declining crude oil prices and improved geopolitical sentiment. Analysts anticipate further upward movement for the Nifty 50, with upcoming quarterly earnings reports expected to guide market direction. Sectoral strength was observed in Realty, Pharma, Healthcare, and Cement, while broader market indices showed mixed performance. Foreign investors were net buyers, contrasting with domestic institutional selling.

title: Vijay Kedia shares a simple market lesson that most retail investors miss: Don't chase today's favourite
summary: In a post on social media platform X on July 2, Kedia said markets do not move in a straight line but instead rotate through different phases, creating fresh opportunities for investors who can identify them early.

title: HDFC Bank share price to be in focus on Monday as lender reports strong Q1 business update: Here's what the numbers say
summary: HDFC Bank's advances grew to  ₹31.27 lakh crore in June quarter, while deposits rose 14.7% YoY. Its shares experienced fluctuations, gaining 1% in the past week but down 19% in 2026.

title: Will Bulls remain in control in July? History says Nifty 50 has a 72% success rate
summary: July historically benefits the Nifty 50, showing gains 18 of 25 years. With a 72% success rate and an average return of 2.19%, macroeconomic factors promote positive momentum this July, though seasonality shouldn't be the sole trading strategy.

title: Income Tax: Can you claim bad debt deduction during recovery? ITAT explains
summary: The Ahmedabad ITAT has ruled that businesses can claim a bad debt deduction once the amount is written off in their books and statutory conditions are met, even if recovery proceedings are still pending. The Tribunal also allowed the claim as a business loss under Section 28 of the Income-tax Act.

title: 7 books for stock market investors recommended by Raamdeo Agrawal
summary: Motilal Oswal Chairman Raamdeo Agrawal says purposeful reading shapes better investors and recommends seven timeless investing books, including works by Peter Lynch, Warren Buffett, Philip Fisher and Howard Marks, urging readers to internalise key lessons instead of chasing dozens of titles.

title: Retail investors bet on these 10 small-cap stocks; they rally up to 185% in 3 months
summary: Retail investors raised stakes in 195 Nifty Smallcap 500 stocks during the March 2026 quarter, with over 100 delivering 25-185% returns since April. Four stocks turned multibaggers, while Cemindia Projects, Apollo Micro Systems and Lloyds Engineering led the rally.

title: Gold’s sharp correction: What lies ahead for prices?
summary: Gold has corrected sharply from record highs as a stronger US dollar, elevated bond yields and expectations of prolonged higher interest rates weighed on prices. Experts view the decline as a technical correction, recommending staggered buying and long-term holding amid supportive structural demand.

title: Yes Bank Q1 business update is out; shares to be in focus on Monday: Check details
summary: Yes Bank shares declined 2% in a week but gained 6% in a month and 13% in 2026, closing at  ₹24.39. CASA deposits rose 14.3% YoY, while the bank's board approved a proposal to raise  ₹16,000 crore through equity and debt issuances, pending approvals.

title: Debt mutual funds: Only 4 schemes delivered over 10% SIP returns in 10 years
summary: Very few debt funds have delivered double-digit SIP returns over the past decade. See which schemes topped the charts over three, five and 10 years.

title: 7 personal finance rules everyone should know before turning 30 to build lasting wealth
summary: Strong money habits build lasting wealth. These personal finance rules can help young Indians save smarter, invest early, avoid costly debt, and plan for retirement with confidence. Small financial decisions today create greater security and long-term financial success.

title: 8th Pay Commission:  ₹18,000 to  ₹69,000? Here's the math behind the demand
summary: Employee unions have proposed raising the minimum basic pay to  ₹69,000 from  ₹18,000. Here's a breakdown of the key calculations behind the demand.

title: This small-cap stock has doubled investor wealth in just 3 months; check details
summary: Bluspring Enterprises has seen a remarkable 112% surge in three months, rallying 194% from its 52-week low. The stock reached a 52-week high of  ₹131.60 following substantial order wins from its subsidiary STEAG Energy Services, enhancing its order book significantly.

title: Market participation is not wealth creation: 5 mistakes retail investors should avoid
summary: Experts underscore that there is a world of difference between rebalancing your portfolio and churning it. The former is good, the latter not.

title: Investing discipline beats market predictions: Why experts want investors to ignore the noise
summary: Investing should be calm and research-based, not influenced by social media hype. Experts urge investors to validate sources, consider risks, and focus on data. Maintaining discipline and sticking to personal goals is crucial for long-term success in wealth creation.

title: Can a  ₹15 lakh FD generate  ₹1 lakh annual income? Here's the simple calculation
summary: A  ₹15 lakh fixed deposit can deliver a steady annual income with the right interest rate. See how a  ₹15 lakh FD can generate around  ₹1 lakh yearly, compare current bank FD rates, and understand the impact of taxes before investing.

title: 8th pay commission to visit Mumbai railway depts for firsthand experience of working conditions — What's on the agenda?
summary: 8th pay commission: The panel will visit various railway departments in Mumbai to gain firsthand experience of employees' working conditions. On the agenda is observation of daily operations, duties and job risks. &nbsp;

summary: ‘Doesn’t matter if you win or lose,’ Rafael Nadal on his business ventures and what tennis taught him about investing‘Doesn’t matter if you win or lose,’ Rafael Nadal on what tennis taught him about investing

title: Which equity mutual funds topped SIP returns? These AMCs dominated the rankings
summary: Small-cap and mid-cap funds dominated the SIP return charts over three, five and 10 years. The rankings also reveal a handful of AMCs that consistently produced some of the best-performing equity mutual funds.

title: DA hike, bonus, minimum wage increase — Here's what Himachal Pradesh State Forest Development Corporation staff will get
summary: DA hike: Himachal Pradesh State Forest Development Corporation (HPSFDC) employees are set to receive a 3% hike in dearness allowance, minimum wage hike, and bonus for staff who draw up to  ₹21,000 monthly salary.&nbsp;
